items.name: Goblin Essence
items.description: A swirling green vial containing the raw life force of a goblin. It smells faintly of moss and iron, and hums with chaotic energy.

items.name: Goblin Ear
items.description: A grisly trophy favored by bounty hunters in Veyra.

items.name: Rusty Shortsword
items.description: A dull, pitted blade stolen from some unlucky traveler. Barely sharp, but quick to wield.

items.name: Torn Leather Armor
items.description: A strip of worn leather armor, reeking of goblin sweat and smoke.

items.name: Worn Leather Boots
items.description: A rough leather boots,it smells of goblin's dirty feets, yikes.

items.name: Worn Leather Gloves
items.description: Are you really going to wear this ?!

items.name: Goblin Essence
items.description: A swirling green vial containing the raw life force of a goblin. It smells faintly of moss and iron, and hums with chaotic energy.

items.name: Goblin Ear
items.description: A grisly trophy favored by bounty hunters in Veyra.

items.name: Chipped Goblin Ring
items.description: Can we even call this a ring ?

items.name: Goblin Amulet
items.description: A weird looking amulet,goblins are weird like that

items.name: Goblin Leather Helmet
items.description: A torn leather helmet but its better than nothing.

items.name: Orc Essence
items.description: A dense, green aura sealed within a crystal vial, radiating heat and the pulse of raw aggression. Said to carry the strength and fury of the orc it was taken from, itâ€™s valued by blacksmiths.

items.name: Orc Fang
items.description: A thick, curved fang taken from the jaw of a fallen orc. Its surface is stained from years of battle, and warriors sometimes wear them as trophies to show victory over the savage clans.

items.name: Goblin Amulet
items.description: A weird looking amulet,goblins are weird like that

items.name: Iron Axe
items.description: A brutal weapon of crude craftsmanship,nicked from countless battles, it relies on raw strength over finesse, capable of splitting both shields and bone in a single swing.

items.name: Worn Leather Boots
items.description: A rough leather boots,it smells of goblin's dirty feets, yikes.

items.description: A thick, curved fang taken from the jaw of a fallen orc. Its surface is stained from years of battle, and warriors sometimes wear them as trophies to show victory over the savage clans.

items.name: Chipped Goblin Ring
items.description: Can we even call this a ring ?

items.name: Stone Hammer
items.description: A heavy warhammer carved from solid rock and bound with crude iron bands. Though lacking in elegance, each swing delivers crushing force capable of shattering shields, bones, and even thin stone walls.

items.name: Goblin Essence
items.description: A swirling green vial containing the raw life force of a goblin. It smells faintly of moss and iron, and hums with chaotic energy.

items.name: Goblin Ear
items.description: A grisly trophy favored by bounty hunters in Veyra.

items.name: Hobgoblin Copper Armor
items.description: Sturdy plate armor forged from hammered copper, polished to a warm, reddish sheen. While heavier than leather, it offers reliable protection and is often engraved with simple war markings to signify rank within the hobgoblin legions.

items.name: Hobgoblin Copper boots
items.description: Heavy copper-plated boots reinforced with leather straps, designed to endure long marches and brutal combat. Their weight makes each step thunderous, a sound meant to unnerve enemies before the fight begins.

items.name: Hobgoblin Copper Gloves
items.description: Thick leather gloves reinforced with copper plating across the knuckles and forearms. Built for both protection and crushing blows, they allow hobgoblin soldiers to strike with punishing force in close combat.

items.name: Hobgoblin Copper helmet
items.description: A solid copper helm with a ridged crest and narrow eye slits, built for both protection and intimidation.

items.name: Hobgoblin Copper Spear
items.description: A long, disciplined weapon with a polished copper spearhead mounted on a sturdy iron shaft. Balanced for both thrusting and formation fighting, it gleams in the sunlight as a symbol of the hobgoblin legionsâ€™ precision and order.

items.name: Troll Blood Essence
items.description: A vial filled with the thick, dark green blood of a troll. Its foul stench lingers, but highly sought after by alchemists and blacksmiths alike.

items.name: Crude Chain Amulet
items.description: A crude necklace made from heavy iron chain links. Too large and heavy for most mortals to wear comfortably, but trolls prize it as both ornament and symbol of strength. It radiates a raw, savage power.

items.name: Stone Hammer
items.description: A heavy warhammer carved from solid rock and bound with crude iron bands. Though lacking in elegance, each swing delivers crushing force capable of shattering shields, bones, and even thin stone walls.

items.name: Lizzardmen blood
items.description: A swirling vial containing the distilled essence of a fallen Lizardman. The liquid shifts between red and black, shimmering like scales under moonlight. It carries the cold-blooded vitality of its origin, a key ingredient in crafting weapons meant to slay reptilian foes.

items.name: Ember thread Robe
items.description: A robe woven with threads that glow like fading embers. Though the fabric feels light, faint warmth radiates from within, protecting its wearer from flames while amplifying their own fiery magic.

items.name: Lizardman Scales
items.description: Tough scales pried from the hide of a Lizardman. Their surface gleams faintly in the light, shifting between shades of green and black. Lightweight yet resilient, these scales are prized by armorers for crafting gear that balances protection with mobility.

items.name: Trollish Iron
items.description: A dense chunk of black iron carried by trolls, scavenged from ruins and reforged with brute strength rather than skill. Its surface is jagged and scorched, yet it holds unnatural durability. Blacksmiths prize it as a core material for heavy weapons and unbreakable armor.

items.name: Ember-thread Gloves
items.description: Gloves threaded with ember-infused fibers, their seams glowing faintly like smoldering ash. They are cool to the touch, yet flare with heat when channeling magic. Worn by flamecasters.

items.name: Ember-tread Boots
items.description: Boots woven from the same ember-infused threads as the robe. Each step leaves behind a faint trace of warmth, as if embers smoldered beneath the wearerâ€™s feet. Light and flexible.

items.name: Stone Hammer
items.description: A heavy warhammer carved from solid rock and bound with crude iron bands. Though lacking in elegance, each swing delivers crushing force capable of shattering shields, bones, and even thin stone walls.

items.name: Lizardman Heart
items.description: A still-beating heart ripped from a fallen Lizardman. Even in death, it pulses with cold-blooded vitality, exuding a faint aura of venom and swamp magic. Alchemists whisper that such hearts hold the key to forging weapons designed to slay scaled foes.

items.name: Ring of Ashen Sparks
items.description: A ring forged from volcanic iron, etched with faint ember runes. Tiny sparks flicker from its surface, warming the air around it. Worn by firecasters to amplify their flames and protect them from being consumed by their own magic.

items.name: Ember thread Robe
items.description: A robe woven with threads that glow like fading embers. Though the fabric feels light, faint warmth radiates from within, protecting its wearer from flames while amplifying their own fiery magic.

items.name: Lizardman Scales
items.description: Tough scales pried from the hide of a Lizardman. Their surface gleams faintly in the light, shifting between shades of green and black. Lightweight yet resilient, these scales are prized by armorers for crafting gear that balances protection with mobility.

items.name: Serpentfang Sword
items.description: A jagged sword wielded by Lizardman warriors.

items.name: Sealed Lizard Essence
items.description: An ancient essence bound in draconic sigils, pulsing faintly beneath layers of hardened magma. Within it sleeps the will of a forgotten Lizard King's kin, waiting to be unbound by fire and blood. Breaking the seal releases both power and wrath.

items.name: Small fire essence
items.description: A faint fragment of elemental flame captured from fallen fire-touched beasts. Its warmth never fades, even in water. When gathered in great numbers, these embers can rekindle the forges of the ancients.

items.name: Arcane Treat S
items.description: A rare and glowing delicacy crafted from enchanted ingredients that increases your pet's exp by 300 points.

items.name: Elite Scale Shard
items.description: sharp elite lizardman scale fragment glowing with faint magma veins.

items.name: Full Hp Potion
items.description: A magic Potion that Heals You To Full Hp.

items.name: Vanguard Heartforge Core
items.description: A dense molten core forged within the heart of the strongest vanguard. It contains the essence of unwavering defense.

items.name: Scorched Scale Boots
items.description: Durable boots used by Lizardman foot soldiers. The soles are layered with volcanic rock for grip and heat resistance.

items.name: Scorched Scale Gloves
items.description: Thick gloves woven from lizard hide and hardened with ash resin. Designed to withstand molten weapons.
